reviews.comment:
Desastre, atención horrible. Solo tenían un surtidor abierto, cola de 30 minutos. Tenía promoción con modo y nadie sabía cómo generar un qr con lo cual no pude acceder a la promoción.

(Translated by Google)
Disaster, horrible service. They only had one pump open, and the line was 30 minutes long. I had a promotion with a specific mode, but nobody knew how to generate a QR code, so I couldn't access the promotion.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The guys on duty were very hardworking, friendly, and fast... there was even a motorcycle that tried to cut in line when there were so many cars and motorcycles waiting, and they wouldn't let it... I loved it

reviews.comment:
Buena atención del personal, limpiaron cuidadosamente el parabrisas y espejos retrovisores. La aplicación funciona perfectamente y hacen los descuentos. Como está en refacciones la estación de servicio, se demora un poco al ingresar, ya que hay que hacer cola por Av. Cabildo. De todas formas es recomendable por los precios económicos del combustible, porque funciona la aplicación de YPF y porque está bien ubicada. Ultimamente la atención de algunos empleados se ha vuelto deficiente, se quedan hablando entre ellos y cuando les cabe lo atienden a uno. Por otro lado las colas siguen a la ordend el día y si uno está esperando en la cola sobre CAbildo se le pondrán adelante los autos de lac alle lateral y tendrán que bajarse a pelear por su lugar. A tener en cuenta. Igual tienen los mejores precios pero la aplicación de YPF a veces no Funciona.

(Translated by Google)
The staff was very attentive and carefully cleaned the windshield and rearview mirrors. The app works perfectly and they apply the discounts. Since the gas station is under renovation, there's a slight delay when entering, as you have to queue on Av. Cabildo. However, it's recommended for its affordable fuel prices, the reliable YPF app, and its convenient location. Lately, some employees have been less attentive; they tend to chat amongst themselves and only serve customers when they feel like it. Also, long lines are still common, and if you're waiting in line on Cabildo, cars from the side street will cut in front of you, forcing you to get out and fight for your place. Something to keep in mind. They still have the best prices, but the YPF app sometimes doesn't work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZ1p2Vk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
En ACA Cabildo 1500: Muy buena atención al cargar nafta y con la gente de seguridad. Comimos en la Full y fue excelente la atención de Valentina y muy ricas las hamburguesas que preparó Gisell.

(Translated by Google)
At ACA Cabildo 1500: Very good service when filling up with gas and with the security guards. We ate at Full Service and Valentina's service was excellent, and the hamburgers Gisell prepared were delicious.
